content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

December 3, 2002

William R. Phillips
Committee for Magnolia Park
824 Blossom Court
Petaluma, CA 94952

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-326

Dear Mr. Phillips:

This letter confirms the receipt of your November 26, 2002 request for advice regarding City of Petaluma Councilmember Bryant Moynihan. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of Mr. Moynihan, for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I enclose a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review. If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file a formal complaint (see enclosed complaint form) with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

JWW:jg
Enclosures
